## Enterprise Quality Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's **Clean Architecture** and SOLID principles.
- [ ] I have added **Type Hints** (`mypy` passes).
- [ ] I have added or updated **Unit Tests** for this logic.
- [ ] I have verified that no **Secrets or PII** are logged (SOC2 compliance).
- [ ] **Agentic Changes:** If modifying an agent prompt, I have evaluated the token cost and tested for hallucination regressions.
